rulings.Case Title: TRAVIS POWELL et al VS. A. W. CHESTERTON COMPANY et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, AUGUST 6, 2007, LINE 1. DEFENDANT SHELL OIL COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. DEFENDANT FAILED TO SHIFT THE BURDEN OF PROOF. PLAINTIFF'S DISCOVERY RESPONSES ARE NOT FACTUALLY DEVOID. GREEN'S DEPOSITION SETS FORTH FACTS ESTABLISHING DEFENDANT'S CONTROL OF THE WORKSITE AND A FACTUAL BASIS FOR GREEN'S TESTIMONY OF EXPOSURE TO ASBESTOS. =(302/PJM/KD)

rulings.Case Title: MARY JOSEPHINE KAHN VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPALITY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Re-Notice Of Motion And Motion For Reclassification Of Limited Civil Jurisdiction Case To Unlimited Civil Jurisdiction Case By This Pleading
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, AUGUST 6, 2007, LINE 2. PLAINTIFF MARY KAHN'S Motion For Reclassification Of Limited Civil Jurisdiction Case To Unlimited Civil Jurisdiction Case By This Pleading IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO DEMONSTRATE GOOD CAUSE UNDER C.C.P. SECTION 473 BASED ON THE HOLDING IN ZAMORA V CLAYBORN CONTRACTING (2002) 28 CAL. 4TH 249. THE DETERMINATION OF THE APPROPRIATE JURISDICTION TO FILE THE ACTION INVOLVES THE PROFESSIONAL JUDGMENT OF COUNSEL. IT IS NOT A DECISION FAIRLY IMPUTABLE TO THE CLIENT. =(302/PJM/KD)

rulings.Case Title: INFINITY RESOURCES INC VS. ORACLE CORPORATION et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, AUGUST 6, 2007, LINE 3. DEFENDANT ORACLE CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS DENIED. DEFENDANT HAS FAILED TO SHIFT THE BURDEN OF PROOF. DEFENDANT HAS NOT EFFECTIVELY ADDRESSED PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM BASED ON REPRESENTATIONS CONCERNING THE "TOTAL COST OF OWNERSHIP". THE CLAIM IS PLEADED IN PARAGRAPHS 52 AND 55. THE CLAIM IS NOT BARRED BY THE PAROLE EVIDENCE RULE BECAUSE THE ALLEGED PROMISE IS INDEPENDENT OF AND NOT INCONSISTENT WITH THE WRITTEN CONTRACT. THE WRITTEN CONTRACT IS FOR THE LICENSE NOT THE IMPLEMENTATION OF THE SOFTWARE. =(302/PJM/PB)

rulings.Case Title: LORENZO LOGORECI et al VS. FRED G MEIS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Compel Arbitration
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, AUGUST 6, 2007, LINE 8. DEFENDANT FRED MEIS, MEIS & ASSOCIATES AND MEIS & ALEXANDER'S Petition To Compel Arbitration IS GRANTED. THE FRAUD ALLEGED BY PLAINTIFF DOES NOT PERTAIN TO THE ARBITRATION AGREEMENT. ALL OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIMS ARISE OUT OF THE ATTORNEY-CLIENT RELATIONSHIP DURING AND AFTER ITS TERMINATION. =(302/PJM/PB)
